hero.subtitle: Software Engineering Consulting
hero.title: Senior engineering for
hero.description: We are a team of senior engineers and leaders with experience in the most demanding platforms in the region. We solve complex software challenges — from enterprise architectures to custom digital products — with the same level of precision and commitment.

about.label: WHO WE ARE
about.title: Strategic partners in software engineering
about.description: We are four engineers with experience at companies like BBVA, Santander, Accenture, Endava, and Rootstrap. We came together to build something of our own: an agile consultancy where clients talk directly to those who solve the problem.
valuePoints: Real seniority: we come from operating critical systems in production
We solve everything from complex architectures to custom products
Clear work process, direct communication, no intermediaries
We help you find the ideal resource for your project
about.mission: To be the engineering team our clients need, with the judgment to make good technical decisions, the experience to execute them, and the responsibility to see them through to the end.

services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.title: What we do, we do well
services.description: Whether you need to build something new, modernize what you have, or add engineers to your team, we work with the same level of rigor.

craft.name: Craft
craft.subtitle: We develop software, leading projects until delivering the final product.

services.title: Digital Product Development
services.description: We build platforms, applications, and custom digital products — from an e-commerce with custom integrations to complex internal systems. We adapt to the stack and project context.

services.title: Architecture and Distributed Systems
services.description: We design architectures that scale: microservices, cloud-native, monolith migrations. Especially useful when the current system is becoming a bottleneck.

services.title: Integrations and Enterprise Systems
services.description: We connect systems that don't talk to each other: SAP, ERPs, third-party APIs, payment gateways, tax authorities. If it has integration complexity, it's our terrain.

services.title: Applied AI
services.description: We incorporate artificial intelligence where it makes real sense: process automation, data analysis, internal assistants, operational optimization, with concrete results.

talent.name: Talent
talent.subtitle: We are engineers hiring engineers. We know exactly what to look for and how to evaluate it.

services.title: Technical Search and Selection
services.description: We identify engineers who truly fit your team — technically and culturally. We evaluate ourselves because we know what it means to work in production with those profiles.

services.title: AI-Powered Process
services.description: We use artificial intelligence to accelerate the search, analyze profiles, and predict technical and cultural compatibility. We reach the right candidates faster without lowering the evaluation standard.

services.title: Onboarding and Integration
services.description: We accompany the engineer's first months on your team. We follow up, resolve friction, and ensure the incorporation is successful.

team.label: OUR FOUNDING TEAM
team.title: Four engineers, real experience
team.description: We come from working on some of the most demanding platforms in the region — BBVA, Santander, ICBC, Accenture, Endava — and decided to build something of our own. That gives us a key perspective: we know what it costs when a system fails in production.

members.name: Ignacio Sileo
members.bio: SAP FI-CA specialist with experience leading implementations in high-complexity enterprise companies. Knows business processes from the inside and how to translate them into technical solutions that work.

members.name: Matías Castillo
members.bio: App Owner at BBVA, in charge of critical financial systems with millions of daily transactions. Understands what real technical responsibility means in environments where there's no margin for error.

members.name: Nicolás Gómez
members.bio: Background at Santander and ICBC developing and evolving core banking products and high-criticality transactional systems. Specialist in architectures that cannot fail.

members.name: Rodrigo Hernandez
members.bio: Experience building scalable cloud-native platforms. Reference in microservices architectures and distributed solutions.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Do you have a project in mind?
contact.description: Whether you have something concrete to quote or are exploring options, tell us what it's about.

footer.description: We are a senior software engineering team with experience on the most demanding platforms in the region. We solve complex technical challenges with judgment, experience, and accountability.

seo.description: Senior software engineering consultancy specializing in custom development, integrations, and technical team building. We work with companies that need solutions that work, scale, and endure.
seo.titleDefault: Tonk Solutions | Senior Software Engineering & Technical Recruitment
seo.ogTitle: Tonk Solutions | Senior Software Engineering & Technical Recruitment
seo.ogImageAlt: Tonk Solutions - Senior engineering for projects that matter

schema.slogan: Senior engineering for projects that matter
schema.servicesListDescription: Specialized software engineering consulting services for financial institutions, fintechs, and enterprise corporations.
schema.professionalServiceDescription: Software engineering consulting specialized in systemic continuity between legacy systems (Core Banking, SAP, ERP) and modern technologies (Cloud-Native, Microservices, AI).

financial.name: Financial Software Engineering
financial.description: Design and maintenance of critical transactional platforms with high volume, ensuring financial integrity and security in Core Banking and payment methods.

cloudNative.name: Cloud-Native Architecture and Microservices Migration
cloudNative.description: Transformation of monolithic applications into scalable and resilient ecosystems, with architectures that support demand peaks without degrading service.

enterprise.name: Enterprise Solutions, SAP & ERP
enterprise.description: Orchestration of critical processes in large corporations where data precision is non-negotiable, with SAP integration and ERP modernization.

ai.name: Applied AI and Enterprise Automation
ai.description: Artificial intelligence engineering with academic and practical support for knowledge management and process optimization in business environments.
